content:
// PROJECT: REALITY WIELDER
[AUDIO LOG TRANSCRIPT]

Dr. H. Samuels here. We are beginning this log as of 17/08/1912. We are planning to build something called a Scranton Reality Anchor that can be remotely controlled as well as be used anywhere in the world. Our plan here is to build and have at least 32 reactors and 64 coolant pipes with sodium for each SRA. We will have a group of 5 big SRAs, and they will require a lot of power to be operated. We are currently waiting on word for fusion reaction, but that will come within a few years.

I know this may sound like a lot, but this is as per the orders of the Director. He wants us to build this so we can protect every single HQ and outpost that we currently have while having some slots left for personal use as per the Director's request. We have documents on SCP-7379. We will replicate it and improve ours to their maximum. Hence the requisite of 32 reactors and/or at least 6 fusion reactors. We will need a constant source of energy so these reactors will do their job as best as they can. Sodium is one of the best coolants. We will also need at least 48 turbines and these reactors will be able to fill all of them in just 6 hours.

We are aware of the cautions and problems that may appear, but for all of the reality anchors that may surround these, we are able to recover and fix them to our personal use, though limited they are still powerful. These reality anchors will operate to their maximum, meaning they will protect us from any reality-warping or fractures that may happen. The size of each reactor is 1000 meters squared. They will be able to power the group of SRAs until almost forever. These will be located within the main Pandora's Acolytes HQ. These reality anchors are able to protect each and every single HQ and outpost by Pandora's Acolytes. Each SRA also contains Anderson Reality Anchors and Lang-Scranton Reality Anchors. This is why they are able to protect us against most reality fracturation events.

// PROJECT AND OPERATION: BROKEN VEIL

The Broken Veil is made up of eight Lamina Pandorae soldiers: Riley, Adam, CONTACT-005, VEIL-003, LANG-002, Hailey, Cain, and Tyler. They will divide into groups of 4, commanded to kill two members of the council at the same time. This is supposed to be a professional and covert operation. Only High Command and Division Overseers are permitted knowledge of this operation.

// CONTINGENCY: ISD DEAL

If the deal with the Internal Security Department has not yet been completed, then a group will proceed to locate the Liaison's middleman to deal a piece of flesh from SCP-9098. They will then look for Mr. Death from the Shadow Legion and possibly trick him into handing in the cognitohazard, or do the same with any other Shadow Legion member and use it on Mr. Death or that Shadow Legion member.

Members of the Shadow Legion are possibly resistant. If that goes wrong, you are required to terminate the Shadow Legion member. If it is Mr. Death, be aware of your surroundings at all times. He may have already designated you as a target. He will come for you. Mr. Death cannot be killed through conventional means. He can only be permanently killed if he is fed a piece of flesh from SCP-9098, at which point he will cease to exist as his atoms become unstable.

If necessary, seek assistance from Kaspar's Phase Shifters. Approach them with respect. "Glory be Kaspar" is the required greeting. Only one of the KillSquad's members may execute radio playsound commands. If cognitohazards or memetic agents are acquired, they will be handed to ISD. After that is confirmed, proceed to feed Mr. Death a piece of flesh from SCP-9098. Then proceed to the primary objective.

// PRIMARY OBJECTIVE

After the ISD contingency is resolved, proceed to killing O5 Council members two by two. Proceed with caution at all stages. Additionally, if members of Vanguard Corp. resist handing over the tablet, you may take it by force. Locate the person holding the backup.

CODENAMES ON FILE

Water: Possible wielder of the tablet
Raptor: Wields the backup
Tobi: Possible wielder of the tablet

NOTE: This is only a draft of the plan. Subject to revision prior to final execution.
// INFORMATION SECURITY PROTOCOL

During Operation Broken Veil, all participating operatives are required to wear informational buffers made by Erebus Research. These will fragment your sensitive data. Your voice will also be hidden behind a mask, so there are almost zero chances that they will find out who you are.

The informational buffers will fragment all of your information and divide each piece into our database. This is why they are called fragments. The way this works is by blocking all available vectors through which an operative or someone working under the Foundation may trace you. This functions similarly to a jammer and is nearly undetectable.

CLASSIFICATION LEVEL-PSI. THIS DOCUMENT IS KNOWN TO HIGH COMMAND AND DIVISION OVERSEERS ONLY. DISCLOSURE TO ANY PERSONNEL BELOW THIS THRESHOLD IS A CAPITAL OFFENSE.
